notes: Stats and rules verified against Wahapedia datasheet.
Weapon list includes all options from the datasheet; the app may show only equipped weapons (policy question).
Points cost is the base Hive Tyrant cost before any weapon upgrades.
Keywords are the canonical 40k game keywords (all-caps on the datasheet).
FIXTURE REQUIREMENT: Needs 'Xenos - Tyranids.cat' loaded to test against live data.
To add the fixture: download from https://github.com/BSData/wh40k-10e and place in test/

knownDiscrepancies.note: Synaptic Imperative is not a standalone <rule> node in the BSData catalog; it appears as a named ability group / profile category header. The pipeline surfaces only materialised rule nodes, so this name is never emitted. Removed from expectedRules; absence is correct pipeline behaviour for this fixture version.
Warlord is a keyword / category tag in the BSData catalog, not a <rule> or <profile type='ability'> node. It is not expected to surface in the rules pipeline output. Removed from expectedRules.

Shadow in the Warp is present on the base unit as a direct <infoLink type='rule'> but _resolveInfoLink currently only materialises links whose target is a <profile> node. Direct rule infoLinks are therefore dropped. Kept in expectedRules so the audit failure remains visible. Fix tracked as: M5 bind enhancement for direct infoLink type='rule' targets.
